cn.description:
IIWII is a minimalist camera app that brings the beauty of analog film photography to your iPhone.

IT IS WHAT IT IS — No complicated settings, no endless menus. Just point, shoot, and capture authentic moments with stunning film-inspired looks applied in real-time.

TIMELESS FILM LOOKS
• Carefully crafted presets inspired by classic film stocks
• Real-time preview — what you see is what you get
• Adjustable intensity for your perfect look
• Import your own .cube LUT files as custom looks
• Look Manager — create and fine-tune your looks with tone curves, color mixing, white balance and more
• Natural Processing — less computational overprocessing, more authentic camera feel

FULL MANUAL CONTROL
• White Balance, Shutter Speed, ISO and Focus
• Each parameter toggleable between Auto and Manual
• Swipe down to reveal, swipe up to hide

THOUGHTFUL FEATURES
• RAW+ Capture on all iPhones — save DNG files alongside your photo
• Portrait mode with natural depth-of-field blur
• Double Exposure — blend two shots into one, just like real film
• Self-Timer with 2, 5 or 10 second countdown
• Record video with real-time film looks applied
• Grid overlays and horizon level for composition
• Built-in gallery with sharing and favorites
• QR Code detection

DESIGNED FOR SIMPLICITY
• Clean, distraction-free interface
• Ambient light effect reacts to your camera feed (iOS 26)
• Quick preset switching with swipe gestures
• Double-tap to flip camera
• Edge exposure slider for precise control
• Customizable top bar — choose your controls
• Lock Screen camera with shared settings and looks

PRIVACY FIRST
• GPS tagging is optional and controllable
• Location data automatically removed when sharing (configurable)
• No analytics, no tracking, no ads — ever

IIWII respects your moments. No cloud uploads, no accounts, no subscriptions. Your photos stay on your device.

Capture what matters. It is what it is.

全球超百万玩家上头的女帝模拟器、真人实拍互动影视新篇《盛世天下》女帝篇现已全球多平台同步上线！《隐形守护者》开发团队 New One Studio 倾力打造！

约1000分钟超长真人演绎全新篇章，批奏折、颁圣旨，亲手斡旋朝野势力；结盟翻盘周旋怀柔，在真伪难辨的后宫博弈与惊心动魄的朝堂交锋中步步为营。从命悬一线到权倾天下，百种活法闯出重围！

【能称帝的互动爽剧，活下来就登基】 从身处绝境到走上权力巅峰，或踏平肃清、或从容化解，这条路上胆敢阻扰你的一切，终将烟消云散。权倾朝野、各掌一方的朝臣势力...当他们向你奉上一片赤诚，你是选择以真情相报、共担风雨，还是不动声色，将这份情意悉数纳入局中，化为勘破天下、执掌乾坤的一枚枚棋子？活成只属于自己的爽剧主角，万般抉择，终成你的盛世天下。

【4K再现传统美学，沉浸体验盛世风华】 从锦缎华服、非遗道具的细腻肌理，到古韵悠扬、震撼人心的国风配乐；从实景搭建的恢弘宫苑，到立体鲜活的人物刻画。媚娘篇和女帝篇共约1500分钟超长真人实拍篇章，搭配最高4K质感呈现，力求呈现东方宫阙的磅礴气象，带你亲身谱写一场波澜壮阔的东方权谋华章。

【深度交互升级，指尖上的施政博弈】 权力不再是一句单薄的台词，而是你指尖实打实的朝堂制衡！指尖轻触，批阅万机奏折；颁布圣旨，执掌朝野格局。是严明法度、肃清朝纲，还是广施仁政、怀柔天下？在重重掣肘中施展帝王权术，开创你的盛世！ 还有升级版专属帝王测试报告，深度剖析你的权谋风骨、危机决断与御人之道。在故事的结束，遇见最真实的自己。

《盛世天下》女帝篇，现已正式上线！立即下载体验，你的盛世，由你执掌！
cn.description:
本作品需全程联网。媚娘篇内容共为十六集，女帝篇内容共为三十二集，均含免费体验章节。

● 能称帝的互动爽剧，活下来就登基！百万销量口碑新篇《盛世天下》女帝篇正式上线

全球百万销量、斩获多项年度大奖的《盛世天下》媚娘篇新篇现已全球多平台正式上线！
立即体验这场惊心动魄的朝堂博弈，共同踏上女帝传奇登顶之路！你的每一个选择，都在塑造独一无二的剧情体验。

《盛世天下》女帝篇开启全新剧情与抉择：
——约1000分钟超长真人实拍篇章（较媚娘篇剧情扩容超2倍）
——4K电影级画面质感，沉浸体验盛世风华
——全新深度交互玩法：批奏折、颁圣旨，亲手执掌朝堂格局
——升级版专属人格测试：在故事的最后遇见真实的自己

● 4K电影级质感，极致东方宫廷盛宴
全程真人演绎、实景搭建，以4K电影的光影调度，匠心复刻东方宫阙的磅礴气象。从锦缎华服、非遗道具的细腻肌理，到古韵悠扬、震撼人心的国风配乐，全方位展现极致的东方古典美学。
由官鸿、黄羿、姚弛、林小宅等知名演员倾情出演。更具真实惊险刺激的体验、更恢弘的场景、更细腻的人物刻画，让盛世不止存在于荧幕之中，而真实铺展于眼前。你将亲身体验“君临天下”的东方美学盛宴！

● 从默默无闻少女到传奇女帝，你的剧本你来写！
想冲破命运的裹挟？在本作中，你将体验到最惊心动魄的宫廷权谋博弈！从默默无闻的少女，到在多方势力的掣肘中破局，最终登顶权力巅峰。感受运筹帷幄、制衡朝野的帝王智慧，这条逆天改命的称帝之路，由你亲手开创！

● 约1500分钟真人演绎内容，沉浸体验帝王人生
匠心打磨的媚娘篇与女帝篇共约1500分钟实拍篇章，为你铺陈开一幅波澜壮阔的盛世画卷。面对波谲云诡的朝堂局势，你的每一次落子、每一个抉择，都将引发蝴蝶效应。高燃反转、重重悬疑……在步步惊心中执掌乾坤，亲手改写王朝命运！
为你情有独钟或爱恨交织的角色打榜助力，谁能问鼎全球人气榜首，全在你的掌控之中。

● 告别旁观，真正体验执掌天下
摒弃枯燥的点击对话，体验深度交互玩法！权力不再是一句单薄的台词，而是你指尖实打实的朝堂制衡 ：
【批阅奏折】：指尖轻点，批阅如山奏折。平衡世家门阀，一笔落定，便是江山气象。
【颁布圣旨】：权衡利弊裁定朝野格局。是施行严明法度，还是施以仁君之恩？在掣肘中展现帝王权术，实现海晏河清的盛世宏图！

● 你是什么类型的帝王？专属人格测试报告升级
在故事的终点，你还将获得一份升级版专属帝王测试报告！深度剖析你的权谋风格、危机决策与御人手段。究竟是权情兼收、八面玲珑的“绝命鹤顶红”，至情至性、赴汤蹈火的“风月曼陀罗”，还是心狠手辣、一心问鼎的“卷王见手青”？在故事的终点，看见最真实的自己，生成你的专属人格图鉴分享给全世界！

【核心特色：这就是你从未体验过的江湖】

1.  “移动端发货”：独属于你的无缝武侠大世界，真实武林画卷
       无读条世界：告别加载画面！我们打造了一个面积达256丈的无缝大世界——中原、江南、西域、南疆……从熙熙攘攘的古城街区，到人迹罕至的雪山秘境，所有场景皆可自由探索。
       活的江湖：昼夜、真实天气、万物动态（可破坏环境、可拾取万物）。世界不仅仅是背景，更是可交互的阶段。
       无束缚体验：轻功飞跃山河，踏波而行，攀爬峭壁。你的武侠梦，不再受束缚。

（我们的核心是创造一个‘无界’的武侠世界。在这里，地图没有空气墙，探索没有读条，整个世界是连贯、可交互、充满生机的）

2.  “第一代最受欢迎的玩法”：千种武学心法，自由搭配的武侠战斗
       没有僵化的“职业”限制！我们提供了超过数百种内功、外功、轻功、技艺。你可以是刀剑双绝的豪侠，也可以是精通音律、以琴音伤人的雅士，甚至是暗器毒术无双的“邪派”高手。
       武学招式不再是一成不变的关键循环。采用我们“无规则”战斗系统，所有的招式心苦自由搭配、组合，你自己的套路。是追求一击必杀的极限爆发，还是决定组建全场连绵不绝的控制？战斗的策略与乐趣，完全交由你。

3.  “你的江湖”：高自由度的人生，你的选择就是规则
       江湖不是非黑即白。你的每一个抉择都会引发难以想象的“因果链”。救下一个路人，他可能就是你未来宗门的引荐人；偷听一桩秘密，或许会让你卷入颠覆王朝的阴谋。
       可以选择拜入名门正派的恪守门规，也可以加入诡谲魔教随心所欲，更可以做个散人，逍遥自在。甚至可以完全抛开打杀，成为一名富甲天下的商贾、巧夺天工的匠人，也可以悬壶济世的神医。这个世界，认可你的每一种活法。

4.  “多达700万字的文本内容，庞大的玩法量级”：沙盒奇遇，要素隐藏线索
       《下一站江湖Ⅱ》的世界是“活”的。NPC们有自己的生活记录和喜怒哀乐。你可能在悬崖下发现前辈遗骸，学到失传绝学；也可能一碗酒，结交到一位隐世高人。
       大量未在任务列表中标记的“奇遇”事件散落在世界各个角落。探索的回报远超你的想象，真正的宝藏，永远献给最好奇的旅人。

5.  “市井百业，多维度沉浸身份”：技艺百态，感受江湖的烟火气
       江湖不止有武功。我们深入嵌入了当今同类生活技能：采矿、采药、锻造、制琴、象棋、书法、绘画、厨艺……这些不仅仅是赚钱的手段，更是提升角色、解锁特殊剧情和关卡能力的关键。一门技艺的技能，也能让你名动江湖。

【故事背景：游戏基础框架】（持续更新）
700万文字庞大世界观：战国末期，三国、百家、江湖！

1.  角色扮演：
① 多出身多结局，每个主角都是全新体验（当前已将门之子、富家千金、寒门书生、江湖浪子、无名小卒等五大身出300多万字主线剧情接近20个结局）

2.  市井身份：
① 皈依各器皿特色的城井身份独特的对应独立剧情、规则玩法。比如刺客对应青衣楼的门玩法派、以及相关的物品万字独立剧情，突出的悬赏及刺杀玩法等

3.  江湖霸图：模拟经营、骑砍LIKE、世界建造
① 物品可加入各具特色的门派
② 每个派都有自己的独立剧情以及与其他门派的恩怨，比如狂刀门和绝剑门的火烧凌云窟大型剧情
③ 每个门派都有自己突出的突出体系，以及规则：比如少林的从扫地僧至罗汉堂首座，敲钟玩法及铜人阵
④ 每个门派都强调自己的武学、心法体系
⑤ 每个门派都可以模拟经营、占领大世界的比如矿山青楼，并开启对应的经营
⑥ 每个门派都一样骑马与砍杀一样的世界争霸

4.  自由成长：习百家武学，走你自己的江湖

cn.description:
《鬼谷八荒》是一款开放世界的沙盒修仙游戏。结合了修仙体系与山海经文化背景，体验从凡人一步步修行成长为强者的过程，与山海经中各种妖、兽战斗。你是否能坚守本心，与困难做斗争；慎做抉择，把握自己的命运。

【遁入修仙世界，开启逆天人生】
鬼谷八荒, 除了财侣法地，还有诡秘莫测的妖兽，危机重重的秘境，难以逾越的天堑，彩光四射的秘宝，等着被人发现。
你将作为一个炼气期小修士从愚村出发，修炼，变强，危机中九死一生。每一次突破，你都能逆天改命，助你在旅途中披荆斩棘，跨越五大州，睥睨天下，再闯上天元山，向天道一问。
【ai互动生态，给NPC完整的一生】
我们构建了完整的NPC互动生态，他们“生活”在这里，有自己的朋友亲族关系网，自己的人生轨迹，不受玩家的进度限制，除非，你决定出手干涉。
你可兼济天下，携手红颜；你可独善其身，快意恩仇；你亦可逆天而行，与全世界为敌。
和NPC们切磋武艺，传授道心，拜师学艺，收徒授业。和NPC在拍卖场喊价厮杀，结束后拔刀相向或顺手牵羊。你将成为修仙界群像中的一部分，是大放异彩，还是默默修行，皆看你如何选择。
【体验小说桥段，感受奇遇惊喜】
英雄救美？爱人为你争风吃醋？五十年之约？卷入神秘组织的明争暗斗？遗迹遇宝？又惨遭夺宝？
这些都有可能发生在你身上。
除NPC交互之外，这里还有丰富的随机事件以及支线任务，在你的旅途中给予惊喜。它们或许会让你烦恼，喂你刀子，也可能让你化险为夷，甚至破而后立。在一步又一步的选择的过程中，你将谱写只属于你的，独一无二的故事。
【打造最强宗门，攻城略地一统八荒】
我们构建了宗门的经营玩法，身为弟子，长老以及宗主，将会有不同的体验。你可以加入大宗门，从最底层的弟子做起，一步步爬上权力的阶梯。也可以空降落魄的小宗门，力挽狂澜，带领宗门重振雄风。
弟子可以完成宗门任务，在宗门大比中出战，或随同门出征作战，为宗门积累资源，为宗门赢取荣誉，为宗门扩张土地。
长老可以管辖门下弟子，传道授业，分配任务职能，加速宗门成长，在宗门大战中指导弟子大杀四方。
宗主则需要统筹全宗的秩序，制定侵略和防守计划，攻防灵矿等资源点，甚至占领他人宗门，夺取专属逆天改命和秘籍。
一统八荒，只要你有宏图壮志和铁腕手段，不再只是幻想。
【构筑独特流派，挑战妖兽神仙】
闯荡这世界，需要有傍身之技。
心法筑根基，武技/灵技探深浅，身法创机会，绝技造优势，神通定乾坤。不同秘籍有不同的特性。
修仙者还有十二大灵根，对应不同的流派，你可以选择专精一路，或全面发展。十二种灵根都有对应的功法秘籍，排列组合可组成丰富的流派，孰强孰弱，皆由你评断。
城镇琅琊阁，宗门功法阁，秘境，各种任务，甚至路边一个土坑里，都可能发现珍奇秘籍，充满惊喜。
这个世界上还有上百种珍奇妖兽，无数修仙者，鬼怪，仙人供您检验自己的实力。挑战升仙擂台，冲击各大洲参玄榜，以此证明自己的实力。你能否踏破冥山的障碍一路向前？构筑的流派能否经历大浪淘沙的检验？
【法宝器灵炼丹画符，三大神器伴前路】
练好自身本领，也别忘了外力加持。
开局三大神器，每一个都会给你带来一种独一无二的系统。双鱼佩可以复活自己和选中之人，昊天眼可以偷学妖兽技能，洞察更多信息，而炼妖壶则可以让你捕获BOSS成为你的小跟班，替你战斗或派遣寻求宝物。
除了开局神器之外，你也能炼制你自己的法宝，并收服器灵与你一起战斗，此外器灵还会在探索中给予你陪伴，触发专属的奇遇等等。
在这里，你还可以学习炼丹画符，堪舆风水，制作帮助你探索世界，整蛊仇人，战斗杀敌的种种道具。至于如何发挥它们真正的作用，皆看各位道友如何抉择。

cn.description:
Dash for Tesla 是一款基于蓝牙连接的数字仪表盘应用，适合希望在手机上查看车辆基础行驶信息的用户使用。

无需登录账号、无需云端授权、无需额外硬件设备，用户可通过手机与支持蓝牙能力的车辆建立本地连接，并查看车速等基础信息。

核心功能

- 无需账号登录
无需输入车辆平台账号密码，也无需远程授权。

- 蓝牙本地连接
通过车辆支持的蓝牙能力进行本地通信，在手机上查看车速等基础信息及部分车辆状态。

- 专注数字仪表体验
以简洁直观的方式展示驾驶中常用的信息，帮助用户更快速地获取重点数据。

- 多种界面风格
提供不同的背景与主题样式，用户可根据个人偏好选择不同显示风格。

- 本地优先
主要依赖本地蓝牙通信，不依赖云端服务，在弱网或无网环境下仍可使用相关本地功能。

隐私与安全

- 无需注册账号。
- 不长期在自建服务器存储车辆数据。
- 蓝牙、定位等权限仅用于设备连接、通信及相关显示功能。

适用场景

- 希望在手机上获得简洁的数字仪表盘体验。
- 不希望提供账号密码或依赖云端远程能力。
- 不希望安装额外硬件设备。

重要说明

Dash for Tesla 为第三方独立开发应用，与 Tesla, Inc. 及其附属公司无官方合作关系，也不存在隶属关系。

本应用基于车辆支持的蓝牙能力提供基础信息展示功能，不提供任何车辆改装、破解或刷写相关能力。

订阅说明

Dash for Tesla 高级会员提供自动续订订阅服务。

可选订阅方案：
- 月度订阅
- 年度订阅

付款将在您确认购买后从 Apple ID 账户扣除。
除非您在当前订阅周期结束前至少 24 小时取消续订，否则订阅将自动续费。
系统将在当前订阅周期结束前 24 小时内收取下一周期费用。
您可以随时在 App Store 账户设置中管理或取消订阅。

隐私政策：https://tdash.cn/privacy.html
使用条款：https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

cn.trackCensoredName: 香港基本法和國安法筆試
cn.trackName: 香港基本法和國安法筆試
cn.description:
App功能包括：

1. 順序練習：考生可以分別針對基本法、國安法試題進行溫習，溫習完所有試題之後，考生可以重新打亂試題次序，再次練習，方便強化練習。

2. 收藏功能：考生可以選擇有需要針對練習的題目進行收藏，之後可以於收藏功能中強化練習。

3. 錯題功能：對於考生練習以及模擬測試過程中答錯的題目，會被歸類到錯題功能中，考生只有於錯題功能中答對該題，題目先會於錯題功能中消失。錯題功能會同時記錄每道題答錯的次數，方便考生針對易錯題目加強練習。

4. 模擬測試：模擬真實考試程序，方便考生參加考試之前評估考試成績，熟悉考試程序。


香港基本法和國安法筆試App由Lemongene Technology Limited開發，本公司提供各類筆試考試和筆試資訊，幫助學生輕鬆考取。筆試產品包括“學車王-模擬筆試搵師傅一站式平台”和“香港基本法和國安法筆試-學車王。

cn.description:
Lysoniq is a premium music player/streamer with cross-device remote control. Install it on your Apple devices to seamlessly play music through any one of them and control the app with the others.

Unlike AirPlay, the playing device streams directly from Apple Music at full resolution — enabling Hi-Res Lossless with zero compression or downsampling on compatible devices. Using an iPhone, iPad, Mac or Apple TV in your hifi system just became easier. No more extension cables or compromises.

Built to handle huge libraries — load thousands of songs into the player without slowdown. Full queue management with swipe to delete, drag to rearrange, tap to skip ahead, and insert into the queue. True Shuffle that actually randomizes your music. 

Browse the full Apple Music catalog with top songs, albums, and playlists across 30+ cities and countries, 17 genres, and dedicated Hi-Res Lossless and Dolby Atmos sections. Access Made For You, Recently Played, New Releases, live radio stations, and all of Apple Music's personalized recommendations. Your full synced library with sorting and filtering included.

Connect and control devices across your home Wi-Fi network with LYNQ. Extend connectivity across cellular data and different Wi-Fi networks with the LYNQ+ subscription.

Built-in Last.fm scrobbling with full history and stats. Four themes including Light, Dark, True Light, and True Dark.

Built from the ground up with audiophiles in mind. Reviewing audio gear? Use a subloop to focus in on a particular section of a track, with the option to add a timer between loops to switch equipment. Automatic sample rate switching on macOS — the system output adjusts to match each track's native resolution, so nothing gets resampled (up to 24-bit/96kHz). Output up to 24-bit/192kHz on iOS, 24-bit/96kHz on macOS, and 24-bit/48kHz on Apple TV.

Now available in 20 languages including Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified, and Traditional), Dutch, Finnish, French, German, Hebrew, Hindi, Italian, Japanese, Norwegian Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese (Portugal), Russian, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish, and Turkish.

Provide feedback to guide its development further and get the features you want. Enjoy all future updates with a one-time purchase.

Requires Apple Music installed on your devices and an active Apple Music subscription. See https://www.lysoniq.app/support for more details.

Terms of Use: https://www.lysoniq.app/terms
License Agreement (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

Compatibility includes iOS 16.4+, macOS 14.6+, tvOS 17.6+

cn.trackName: 戏曲锣鼓 - 电子锣鼓打击垫｜虚拟乐器｜演奏模拟器｜戏曲伴奏
cn.description:
戏曲锣鼓是一款专为戏曲爱好者打造的虚拟打击乐器应用，让你在手机或平板上，随时随地体验传统戏曲锣鼓演奏的魅力。应用内收录多种经典戏曲打击乐器，并支持高度自定义配置，满足不同戏曲流派、演奏风格与个人创作需求。本应用主要有以下特点：

- 简单易用，初学者友好：界面简洁直观，无论是戏曲初学者还是专业爱好者，都能快速上手。通过触屏即可轻松演奏，随时体验传统锣鼓节奏。

- 丰富的戏曲锣鼓乐器：内置多种经典戏曲打击乐器，如大鼓、大堂鼓、小堂鼓、大锣、小锣、风锣、铙钹、小钹、广钹、板鼓、板、梆子、碰铃、木鱼、引磬、铛子、大磬、钟、手鼓，并提供不同力度音色，还原真实演奏体验。

- 高性能无延迟演奏：敲击即响，声音响应迅速；支持快速连续击打、多点触控与多音同时打击，演奏流畅不卡顿、不串音。

- 强大的键盘自定义系统：支持自由调整键盘布局、行列数量、按键大小与间距，支持拖拽交换按键位置，支持背景外观配置，打造更符合个人习惯的戏曲锣鼓演奏界面。

- 灵活的按钮配置：支持按钮颜色自定义、按键图片显示、按键名称修改等功能，每个按键最多可绑定 3 个乐器音色，实现个性化锣鼓经与专属打击垫配置。

- 录音与回放功能：支持实时录制戏曲锣鼓演奏过程，一键保存精彩演奏内容，并可随时回放练习成果，方便记录灵感、复盘节奏与分享作品。

立即下载，开启属于你的戏曲锣鼓演奏之旅！如遇到错误或提供意见与建议，请联系邮箱：yuliuapp@icloud.com

hk.description:
Life on Tiny Planet was calm and carefree until a great disaster occurred - Tiny Planet was hit by a meteor! The world fell apart and now its future depends only on you! Use your imagination and creativity: in order to restore Tiny Planet and help its inhabitants you will have to fix a variety of machines and mechanisms as well as solve puzzles in each of the five chapters of this game. Navigation is simple and intuitive. It doesn't distract you from the witty brain teasers, and you will be able to fully immerse yourself in the unique atmosphere of the game.

*There is no text in this game. It is fun for all ages and suitable for the whole family!
*Five vastly different chapters and over 30 exciting brain teasers (minigames)
*A bright, gorgeous world drawn entirely by hand
*Absorbing game play and simple navigation
*10 enchanting musical themes

- #1 Top Paid Apps for iOS in UK, Japan, German, Russia
- Top 10 Best Games and Top 5 Best Adventure Games of 2011 by Gamezebo
- Best Games of 2011 by GameHouse
- Top 100 Best Indie Games of 2011 by Indie DB. 
- Top 10 on Mac App Store in more countries, TOP 1 - in Japan, Russia, Taiwan, China.

IIWII is a minimalist camera app that brings the beauty of analog film photography to your iPhone.

IT IS WHAT IT IS — No complicated settings, no endless menus. Just point, shoot, and capture authentic moments with stunning film-inspired looks applied in real-time.

TIMELESS FILM LOOKS
• Carefully crafted presets inspired by classic film stocks
• Real-time preview — what you see is what you get
• Adjustable intensity for your perfect look
• Import your own .cube LUT files as custom looks
• Look Manager — create and fine-tune your looks with tone curves, color mixing, white balance and more
• Natural Processing — less computational overprocessing, more authentic camera feel

FULL MANUAL CONTROL
• White Balance, Shutter Speed, ISO and Focus
• Each parameter toggleable between Auto and Manual
• Swipe down to reveal, swipe up to hide

THOUGHTFUL FEATURES
• RAW+ Capture on all iPhones — save DNG files alongside your photo
• Portrait mode with natural depth-of-field blur
• Double Exposure — blend two shots into one, just like real film
• Self-Timer with 2, 5 or 10 second countdown
• Record video with real-time film looks applied
• Grid overlays and horizon level for composition
• Built-in gallery with sharing and favorites
• QR Code detection

DESIGNED FOR SIMPLICITY
• Clean, distraction-free interface
• Ambient light effect reacts to your camera feed (iOS 26)
• Quick preset switching with swipe gestures
• Double-tap to flip camera
• Edge exposure slider for precise control
• Customizable top bar — choose your controls
• Lock Screen camera with shared settings and looks

PRIVACY FIRST
• GPS tagging is optional and controllable
• Location data automatically removed when sharing (configurable)
• No analytics, no tracking, no ads — ever

IIWII respects your moments. No cloud uploads, no accounts, no subscriptions. Your photos stay on your device.

Capture what matters. It is what it is.

hk.description:
极具真实感的俯视视角拉力赛体验！
《Rush Rally Origins》是在初代《Rush Rally》经典俯视视角赛车玩法的基础上，结合《Rush Rally 3》广受好评的精美画质与物理引擎打造而成。游戏中包含有 36 条全新且各有特色的赛道，赛道遍布世界各地，每条赛道的时区和天气情况都会有所不同。比赛会在各种不同路况下进行，包括雪地、碎石、泥土、泥浆和柏油路面！


感受极速快感
在 60fps（在支持的设备上可达到 120fps）的极速环境中，驾驶当前空气动力性能最好的赛车车型，这些赛车在《Rush Rally Origins》中都经过了高度调教，极具驾驶乐趣，使玩家可以尽享俯视视角竞赛所带来的极致体验。在通过不同路况时可以时刻感受到抓地力的改变，不同气候条件也会使驾驶体验千差万别。


世界拉力赛
完成一系列冠军拉力赛事，在我们独特的“点对点”竞赛模式下与其他选手同场竞速，亦或是保持专注，在计时赛模式下集中精力提高自己的完赛时间。


勇攀高峰
打破赛道记录，在全球在线排行榜上扬名立万。下载 4 种车型各异的幽灵赛车，与世界最顶尖车手一较高下。


升级赛车
解锁并升级一系列《Rush Rally》经典车型。利用简便的升级系统来为您量身打造每款车型，以期符合您特定驾驶风格的需求。


优化操控性
游戏操控系统经过详细设计，可同时支持触屏和手柄游玩，使游戏具有更多乐趣，而且在不同设备上都可获得一致的操控体验。同时还提供包括缩放、移动和切换功能的按键，您可以按需选择使用。

三秒記一筆！快速、安全、好用是我們的宗旨，更有 iOS 通知中心的Widget插件。

看看其他人怎麼說：

◎ 分类多样细致明确，操作方便快速。

◎ 預算管理：給自己控制消費一個理由
◎ 多種顏色主題及牆紙，讓您充分個性化
◎ 自定義收支類別和消費賬戶，更符合您的需要
◎ 同時支援 iPhone 和 iPad
◎ 每日記賬提醒

增強功能：
◎ 通過手勢輕鬆複製歷史記錄，並自動將消費日期定位在當天，您只需要修改金額即可。當然，您也可以使用現有金額直接儲存

香港基本法和國安法筆試App由Lemongene Technology Limited開發，本公司提供各類筆試考試和筆試資訊，幫助學生輕鬆考取。筆試產品包括“學車王-模擬筆試搵師傅一站式平台”和“香港基本法和國安法筆試-學車王。

Punch your way through the Streets of Rage once again!

Streets of Rage 4 takes forward the Streets of Rage legacy in this retro beat'em up with hand-drawn comic inspired graphics and updated mechanics.

Streets of Rage comes back for a sequel 25 years after the last episode : a new crime syndicate seems to have taken control of the streets and corrupted the police. All you have to fight against them is your friends... and your fists ! Critically acclaimed, Streets of Rage 4 won several awards and nominated as Best Action Games at the 2020 Game Awards.

FEATURES
- Rediscover the classic Beat em up Streets of Rage Franchise with new fight mechanics
- Get thrilled by the Retro hand-drawn comics-inspired artistic direction by the studio behind Wonder Boy: The Dragon’s Trap serving juicy animations & vivid FX
- Unlock up to 5 new & emblematic playable characters and fight your way through 12 various stages to bring back order to the streets
- Challenge yourself in different modes : Story, Training, Arcade...

Axel, Blaze and their mates will start a very special deranged training with the help of Dr. Zan, who built an AI program from the remnants of Mister X’s brain that simulates every kind of danger they could be facing.

hk.description:
自2006年首次亮相以來，《泰坦之旅》吸引了眾多玩家。在《泰坦之旅》世界中，你將在無拘無束的英雄之旅中獲得全方位的體驗！

你的光榮任務是拯救世界！

單靠諸神無法打敗泰坦，所以需要真正的英雄 - 那就是你！你的成功或失敗將決定人類和奧林匹斯山諸神的命運！與你的定制英雄一起，探索希臘、埃及、巴比倫和中國的神秘、遠古世界。征服成群的傳奇生物，掌握各種武器和武術：射箭、劍術或使用強大的魔法！

遊歷古代和北歐神話世界！

當你旅行前往派特農神廟、大金字塔、巴比倫空中花園、長城、塔耳塔洛斯競技場和其他著名景點時，與神話中的野獸戰鬥。遭遇希臘神話中的最大惡棍，探索北歐未知的土地，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國，然後踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程。

在你的光榮道路上，要麼全部得到，要麼一無所有！

每一個挑戰等待著你，你必須擊敗更大更強的敵人，直到達到目標並迫使泰坦屈服！與勇敢的寵物同伴一起投入戰鬥！尋找具有特殊力量的非凡物品，這些物品將增強你的能力，幫助你前進。傳奇之劍、強大的閃電咒語、魔法、弓箭以及力量超乎想像的無數其他寶藏等待著你 - 它們全都可以在你的戰鬥中使用，在可怕的生物中散佈驚駭和恐懼！

你在等什麼？

不同於其他動作角色扮演遊戲，《泰坦之旅：傳奇版》將迷人的神話世界與無盡而刺激的動作融合在一起，正如你對如此引人入勝的遊戲所期待的！

主要特點：

- 在不朽王座下載包的世界中，你將遇到希臘神話中的最大惡棍，勇敢面對地獄犬的攻擊，危害冥河的河岸。你需要解釋盲人提爾西亞斯的預言，與阿伽門農和阿喀琉斯並肩作戰，用奧德修斯的計策征服這個黑暗的新冒險。

- 在諸神黃昏下載包的北歐未知土地上，你將勇敢面對凱爾特人、諾斯曼人和阿斯加迪神靈的領地！

- 在亞特蘭蒂斯下載包，與探險家會面，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國。據說有一把鑰匙藏在伊拉克利翁的日記中，該日記據傳位於腓尼基城市加迪爾。踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程，包括塔耳塔洛斯競技場，進行史詩般的戰鬥！

+ 經過全面技術修改的《泰坦之旅》實施了所有的重要更新，以賦予這部經典之作最佳的遊戲體驗！

在永恆餘燼DLC可在應用內購買的 中殺死巨巫泰肯之後，英雄受到傳說中的堯帝召喚，回到東方著手對付一直肆虐 這片大陸的邪魔威脅。 在追查過程中，英雄和他的同伴們發現，遠古兇獸窮奇的現身並非只是巧合，必定有兇險萬分的陰謀正在醞釀…

+ 擁有《泰坦之旅》基本版的所有玩家請注意：這裡提到的下載包還將作為附加內容發佈以供購買，以便所有粉絲可以升級他們的遊戲以充分享受所有擴展！

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

hk.description:
戲曲鑼鼓是一款專為戲曲愛好者打造的虛擬打擊樂器應用程式，讓你在手機或平板上，隨時隨地體驗傳統戲曲鑼鼓演奏的魅力。應用程式內收錄多種經典戲曲打擊樂器，並支援高度自訂配置，滿足不同戲曲流派、演奏風格與個人創作需求。本應用程式主要具備以下特色：

- 簡單易用，初學者友善：介面簡潔直觀，無論是戲曲初學者還是專業愛好者，都能快速上手。透過觸控螢幕即可輕鬆演奏，隨時體驗傳統鑼鼓節奏。

- 豐富的戲曲鑼鼓樂器：內建多種經典戲曲打擊樂器，如大鼓、大堂鼓、小堂鼓、大鑼、小鑼、風鑼、鐃鈸、小鈸、廣鈸、板鼓、板、梆子、碰鈴、木魚、引磬、鐺子、大磬、鐘、手鼓，並提供不同力度音色，還原真實演奏體驗。

- 高效能無延遲演奏：敲擊即響，聲音反應迅速；支援快速連續擊打、多點觸控與多音同時演奏，演奏流暢不卡頓、不串音。

- 強大的鍵盤自訂系統：支援自由調整鍵盤佈局、行列數量、按鍵大小與間距，支援拖拽交換按鍵位置，支援背景外觀配置，打造更符合個人習慣的戲曲鑼鼓演奏介面。

- 靈活的按鍵配置：支援按鍵顏色自訂、按鍵圖片顯示、按鍵名稱修改等功能，每個按鍵最多可綁定 3 個樂器音色，實現個人化鑼鼓經與專屬打擊墊配置。

- 錄音與回放功能：支援即時錄製戲曲鑼鼓演奏過程，一鍵保存精彩演奏內容，並可隨時回放練習成果，方便記錄靈感、複盤節奏與分享作品。

立即下載，開啟屬於你的戲曲鑼鼓演奏之旅！如遇到錯誤或有任何意見與建議，請聯絡電子郵件：yuliuapp@icloud.com

mo.description:
《Digline》是一款輕鬆上手的鑽探遊戲。每一次向地下深入，都是一場在進度與風險之間的抉擇，而真正的獎勵，總藏在更深的地底。

每次探險都從你的工坊開始。選擇裝備，駕駛燃料有限、設備簡陋的鑽探機出發。開鑿屬於自己的路線，穿越不斷變化的地層，決定要收集哪些資源，並在燃料耗盡前，思考該升級什麼、交易什麼。

每一次下潛，都可能發現新的材料、更稀有的礦物，以及地底深處意想不到的規律。原本只是單純的挖掘，逐漸演變成探索、效率與時機掌握之間的巧妙平衡。

回到地面後，持續優化你的策略，讓每一次探險都更有效率：

• 升級鑽頭、燃料容量與鑽探效率
• 解鎖價值更高、埋藏更深的新材料
• 規劃最佳路線，讓每一次下潛都收穫滿滿

你的進度會穩定累積，但每一次探險都充滿張力。太過保守，就會錯失珍貴資源；冒險太深，則可能失去一切。

打造屬於自己的探勘節奏：快速有效率的短程挖掘、高風險高報酬的深層探險，或穩紮穩打，逐步征服地底世界。

曾登上美國、英國休閒遊戲排行榜前 10 名，以及德國、挪威等多國前 5 名。現在就加入這場挖掘冒險吧！

原本只是尋找資源的旅程，卻漸漸變得更加神秘。你挖出的隧道會永久保留，地圖會隨著探索不斷擴展，而地下世界也開始不像隨機生成，更像是一個擁有自己歷史的地方。

《Digline》設計理念就是容易上手、適合利用零碎時間遊玩，同時又能帶來長期的成就感。快速開挖、短程探險，享受源源不絕的輕鬆樂趣。

特色：

• 直覺式單指直向操作
• 每次探險只需一、兩分鐘，隨時都能遊玩
• 永久保留的地下隧道，以及持續擴展的地圖
• 多個地下區域，各自擁有不同的資源、危險與驚喜
• 收集資源，用於製作升級與更完善的探險準備
• 工坊系統，讓每一次成功探險都化為永久成長
• 市場交易系統，出售帶回來的資源
• 跨越多次遊戲持續累積的成長，而非單次探險
• 寧靜舒適的氛圍，搭配充滿探索感的地下世界
• 無廣告，沒有任何付費才能獲勝的機制
• 應玩家熱烈要求，現在可選擇購買燃料，繼續向更深處前進，但不需任何付費也能完整體驗整個遊戲
• 成就系統與「每日挖掘」排行榜競賽

挖得越深，礦坑揭露的秘密就越多。

Life on Tiny Planet was calm and carefree until a great disaster occurred - Tiny Planet was hit by a meteor! The world fell apart and now its future depends only on you! mo.description:
IIWII is a minimalist camera app that brings the beauty of analog film photography to your iPhone.

IT IS WHAT IT IS — No complicated settings, no endless menus. Just point, shoot, and capture authentic moments with stunning film-inspired looks applied in real-time.

TIMELESS FILM LOOKS
• Carefully crafted presets inspired by classic film stocks
• Real-time preview — what you see is what you get
• Adjustable intensity for your perfect look
• Import your own .cube LUT files as custom looks
• Look Manager — create and fine-tune your looks with tone curves, color mixing, white balance and more
• Natural Processing — less computational overprocessing, more authentic camera feel

FULL MANUAL CONTROL
• White Balance, Shutter Speed, ISO and Focus
• Each parameter toggleable between Auto and Manual
• Swipe down to reveal, swipe up to hide

THOUGHTFUL FEATURES
• RAW+ Capture on all iPhones — save DNG files alongside your photo
• Portrait mode with natural depth-of-field blur
• Double Exposure — blend two shots into one, just like real film
• Self-Timer with 2, 5 or 10 second countdown
• Record video with real-time film looks applied
• Grid overlays and horizon level for composition
• Built-in gallery with sharing and favorites
• QR Code detection

DESIGNED FOR SIMPLICITY
• Clean, distraction-free interface
• Ambient light effect reacts to your camera feed (iOS 26)
• Quick preset switching with swipe gestures
• Double-tap to flip camera
• Edge exposure slider for precise control
• Customizable top bar — choose your controls
• Lock Screen camera with shared settings and looks

PRIVACY FIRST
• GPS tagging is optional and controllable
• Location data automatically removed when sharing (configurable)
• No analytics, no tracking, no ads — ever

IIWII respects your moments. No cloud uploads, no accounts, no subscriptions. Your photos stay on your device.

Capture what matters. It is what it is.

mo.description:
极具真实感的俯视视角拉力赛体验！
《Rush Rally Origins》是在初代《Rush Rally》经典俯视视角赛车玩法的基础上，结合《Rush Rally 3》广受好评的精美画质与物理引擎打造而成。游戏中包含有 36 条全新且各有特色的赛道，赛道遍布世界各地，每条赛道的时区和天气情况都会有所不同。比赛会在各种不同路况下进行，包括雪地、碎石、泥土、泥浆和柏油路面！


感受极速快感
在 60fps（在支持的设备上可达到 120fps）的极速环境中，驾驶当前空气动力性能最好的赛车车型，这些赛车在《Rush Rally Origins》中都经过了高度调教，极具驾驶乐趣，使玩家可以尽享俯视视角竞赛所带来的极致体验。在通过不同路况时可以时刻感受到抓地力的改变，不同气候条件也会使驾驶体验千差万别。


世界拉力赛
完成一系列冠军拉力赛事，在我们独特的“点对点”竞赛模式下与其他选手同场竞速，亦或是保持专注，在计时赛模式下集中精力提高自己的完赛时间。


勇攀高峰
打破赛道记录，在全球在线排行榜上扬名立万。下载 4 种车型各异的幽灵赛车，与世界最顶尖车手一较高下。


升级赛车
解锁并升级一系列《Rush Rally》经典车型。利用简便的升级系统来为您量身打造每款车型，以期符合您特定驾驶风格的需求。


优化操控性
游戏操控系统经过详细设计，可同时支持触屏和手柄游玩，使游戏具有更多乐趣，而且在不同设备上都可获得一致的操控体验。同时还提供包括缩放、移动和切换功能的按键，您可以按需选择使用。

mo.description:
Dash for Tesla 是一款基于蓝牙连接的数字仪表盘应用，适合希望在手机上查看车辆基础行驶信息的用户使用。

无需登录账号、无需云端授权、无需额外硬件设备，用户可通过手机与支持蓝牙能力的车辆建立本地连接，并查看车速等基础信息。

核心功能

- 无需账号登录
无需输入车辆平台账号密码，也无需远程授权。

- 蓝牙本地连接
通过车辆支持的蓝牙能力进行本地通信，在手机上查看车速等基础信息及部分车辆状态。

- 专注数字仪表体验
以简洁直观的方式展示驾驶中常用的信息，帮助用户更快速地获取重点数据。

- 多种界面风格
提供不同的背景与主题样式，用户可根据个人偏好选择不同显示风格。

- 本地优先
主要依赖本地蓝牙通信，不依赖云端服务，在弱网或无网环境下仍可使用相关本地功能。

隐私与安全

- 无需注册账号。
- 不长期在自建服务器存储车辆数据。
- 蓝牙、定位等权限仅用于设备连接、通信及相关显示功能。

适用场景

- 希望在手机上获得简洁的数字仪表盘体验。
- 不希望提供账号密码或依赖云端远程能力。
- 不希望安装额外硬件设备。

重要说明

Dash for Tesla 为第三方独立开发应用，与 Tesla, Inc. 及其附属公司无官方合作关系，也不存在隶属关系。

本应用基于车辆支持的蓝牙能力提供基础信息展示功能，不提供任何车辆改装、破解或刷写相关能力。

订阅说明

Dash for Tesla 高级会员提供自动续订订阅服务。

可选订阅方案：
- 月度订阅
- 年度订阅

付款将在您确认购买后从 Apple ID 账户扣除。
除非您在当前订阅周期结束前至少 24 小时取消续订，否则订阅将自动续费。
系统将在当前订阅周期结束前 24 小时内收取下一周期费用。
您可以随时在 App Store 账户设置中管理或取消订阅。

使用条款：https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

1. 順序練習：考生可以分別針對基本法、國安法試題進行溫習，溫習完所有試題之後，考生可以重新打亂試題次序，再次練習，方便強化練習。

2. 收藏功能：考生可以選擇有需要針對練習的題目進行收藏，之後可以於收藏功能中強化練習。

4. 模擬測試：模擬真實考試程序，方便考生參加考試之前評估考試成績，熟悉考試程序。

mo.description:
Punch your way through the Streets of Rage once again!

Streets of Rage 4 takes forward the Streets of Rage legacy in this retro beat'em up with hand-drawn comic inspired graphics and updated mechanics.

Streets of Rage comes back for a sequel 25 years after the last episode : a new crime syndicate seems to have taken control of the streets and corrupted the police. All you have to fight against them is your friends... and your fists ! Critically acclaimed, Streets of Rage 4 won several awards and nominated as Best Action Games at the 2020 Game Awards.

FEATURES
- Rediscover the classic Beat em up Streets of Rage Franchise with new fight mechanics
- Get thrilled by the Retro hand-drawn comics-inspired artistic direction by the studio behind Wonder Boy: The Dragon’s Trap serving juicy animations & vivid FX
- Unlock up to 5 new & emblematic playable characters and fight your way through 12 various stages to bring back order to the streets
- Challenge yourself in different modes : Story, Training, Arcade...
- Listen to a new Electro OST with world class musicians such as Olivier Derivière and legend Yuzo Koshiro
- Brand-new custom survival mode to the DLC (Mr. X Nightmare)
- New destroyables to help to maintain the combo counter"- Get retro with up to 13 alternative retro characters, secret retro levels or choose the SoR1&2 OST and enable the Retro Pixel graphics !

* NEW MAJOR FREE UPDATE*

- New co-op moves
- +300 in-game improvements
- Brand-new custom survival mode to the DLC (Mr. X Nightmare)

-MULTIPLAYER UPDATE-

Axel, Blaze and their mates will start a very special deranged training with the help of Dr. Zan, who built an AI program from the remnants of Mister X’s brain that simulates every kind of danger they could be facing.

Crack your knuckles and get ready for Streets of Rage 4 everywhere you go!

mo.description:
自2006年首次亮相以來，《泰坦之旅》吸引了眾多玩家。在《泰坦之旅》世界中，你將在無拘無束的英雄之旅中獲得全方位的體驗！

你的光榮任務是拯救世界！

單靠諸神無法打敗泰坦，所以需要真正的英雄 - 那就是你！你的成功或失敗將決定人類和奧林匹斯山諸神的命運！與你的定制英雄一起，探索希臘、埃及、巴比倫和中國的神秘、遠古世界。征服成群的傳奇生物，掌握各種武器和武術：射箭、劍術或使用強大的魔法！

遊歷古代和北歐神話世界！

當你旅行前往派特農神廟、大金字塔、巴比倫空中花園、長城、塔耳塔洛斯競技場和其他著名景點時，與神話中的野獸戰鬥。遭遇希臘神話中的最大惡棍，探索北歐未知的土地，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國，然後踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程。

在你的光榮道路上，要麼全部得到，要麼一無所有！

每一個挑戰等待著你，你必須擊敗更大更強的敵人，直到達到目標並迫使泰坦屈服！與勇敢的寵物同伴一起投入戰鬥！尋找具有特殊力量的非凡物品，這些物品將增強你的能力，幫助你前進。傳奇之劍、強大的閃電咒語、魔法、弓箭以及力量超乎想像的無數其他寶藏等待著你 - 它們全都可以在你的戰鬥中使用，在可怕的生物中散佈驚駭和恐懼！

你在等什麼？

不同於其他動作角色扮演遊戲，《泰坦之旅：傳奇版》將迷人的神話世界與無盡而刺激的動作融合在一起，正如你對如此引人入勝的遊戲所期待的！

主要特點：

- 在不朽王座下載包的世界中，你將遇到希臘神話中的最大惡棍，勇敢面對地獄犬的攻擊，危害冥河的河岸。你需要解釋盲人提爾西亞斯的預言，與阿伽門農和阿喀琉斯並肩作戰，用奧德修斯的計策征服這個黑暗的新冒險。

- 在諸神黃昏下載包的北歐未知土地上，你將勇敢面對凱爾特人、諾斯曼人和阿斯加迪神靈的領地！

- 在亞特蘭蒂斯下載包，與探險家會面，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國。據說有一把鑰匙藏在伊拉克利翁的日記中，該日記據傳位於腓尼基城市加迪爾。踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程，包括塔耳塔洛斯競技場，進行史詩般的戰鬥！

+ 經過全面技術修改的《泰坦之旅》實施了所有的重要更新，以賦予這部經典之作最佳的遊戲體驗！

在永恆餘燼DLC可在應用內購買的 中殺死巨巫泰肯之後，英雄受到傳說中的堯帝召喚，回到東方著手對付一直肆虐 這片大陸的邪魔威脅。 在追查過程中，英雄和他的同伴們發現，遠古兇獸窮奇的現身並非只是巧合，必定有兇險萬分的陰謀正在醞釀…

+ 擁有《泰坦之旅》基本版的所有玩家請注意：這裡提到的下載包還將作為附加內容發佈以供購買，以便所有粉絲可以升級他們的遊戲以充分享受所有擴展！

mo.description:
Lysoniq is a premium music player/streamer with cross-device remote control. Install it on your Apple devices to seamlessly play music through any one of them and control the app with the others.

Unlike AirPlay, the playing device streams directly from Apple Music at full resolution — enabling Hi-Res Lossless with zero compression or downsampling on compatible devices. Using an iPhone, iPad, Mac or Apple TV in your hifi system just became easier. No more extension cables or compromises.

Built to handle huge libraries — load thousands of songs into the player without slowdown. Full queue management with swipe to delete, drag to rearrange, tap to skip ahead, and insert into the queue. True Shuffle that actually randomizes your music. 

Browse the full Apple Music catalog with top songs, albums, and playlists across 30+ cities and countries, 17 genres, and dedicated Hi-Res Lossless and Dolby Atmos sections. Access Made For You, Recently Played, New Releases, live radio stations, and all of Apple Music's personalized recommendations. Your full synced library with sorting and filtering included.

Connect and control devices across your home Wi-Fi network with LYNQ. Extend connectivity across cellular data and different Wi-Fi networks with the LYNQ+ subscription.

Built-in Last.fm scrobbling with full history and stats. Four themes including Light, Dark, True Light, and True Dark.

Built from the ground up with audiophiles in mind. Reviewing audio gear? Use a subloop to focus in on a particular section of a track, with the option to add a timer between loops to switch equipment. Automatic sample rate switching on macOS — the system output adjusts to match each track's native resolution, so nothing gets resampled (up to 24-bit/96kHz). Output up to 24-bit/192kHz on iOS, 24-bit/96kHz on macOS, and 24-bit/48kHz on Apple TV.

Now available in 20 languages including Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified, and Traditional), Dutch, Finnish, French, German, Hebrew, Hindi, Italian, Japanese, Norwegian Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese (Portugal), Russian, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish, and Turkish.

Provide feedback to guide its development further and get the features you want. Enjoy all future updates with a one-time purchase.

Requires Apple Music installed on your devices and an active Apple Music subscription. See https://www.lysoniq.app/support for more details.

mo.description:
戲曲鑼鼓是一款專為戲曲愛好者打造的虛擬打擊樂器應用程式，讓你在手機或平板上，隨時隨地體驗傳統戲曲鑼鼓演奏的魅力。應用程式內收錄多種經典戲曲打擊樂器，並支援高度自訂配置，滿足不同戲曲流派、演奏風格與個人創作需求。本應用程式主要具備以下特色：

- 簡單易用，初學者友善：介面簡潔直觀，無論是戲曲初學者還是專業愛好者，都能快速上手。透過觸控螢幕即可輕鬆演奏，隨時體驗傳統鑼鼓節奏。

IIWII is a minimalist camera app that brings the beauty of analog film photography to your iPhone.

IT IS WHAT IT IS — No complicated settings, no endless menus. Just point, shoot, and capture authentic moments with stunning film-inspired looks applied in real-time.

TIMELESS FILM LOOKS
• Carefully crafted presets inspired by classic film stocks
• Real-time preview — what you see is what you get
• Adjustable intensity for your perfect look
• Import your own .cube LUT files as custom looks
• Look Manager — create and fine-tune your looks with tone curves, color mixing, white balance and more
• Natural Processing — less computational overprocessing, more authentic camera feel

FULL MANUAL CONTROL
• White Balance, Shutter Speed, ISO and Focus
• Each parameter toggleable between Auto and Manual
• Swipe down to reveal, swipe up to hide

THOUGHTFUL FEATURES
• RAW+ Capture on all iPhones — save DNG files alongside your photo
• Portrait mode with natural depth-of-field blur
• Double Exposure — blend two shots into one, just like real film
• Self-Timer with 2, 5 or 10 second countdown
• Record video with real-time film looks applied
• Grid overlays and horizon level for composition
• Built-in gallery with sharing and favorites
• QR Code detection

DESIGNED FOR SIMPLICITY
• Clean, distraction-free interface
• Ambient light effect reacts to your camera feed (iOS 26)
• Quick preset switching with swipe gestures
• Double-tap to flip camera
• Edge exposure slider for precise control
• Customizable top bar — choose your controls
• Lock Screen camera with shared settings and looks

PRIVACY FIRST
• GPS tagging is optional and controllable
• Location data automatically removed when sharing (configurable)
• No analytics, no tracking, no ads — ever

IIWII respects your moments. No cloud uploads, no accounts, no subscriptions. Your photos stay on your device.

Capture what matters. It is what it is.

Dash for Tesla 是一款基于蓝牙连接的数字仪表盘应用，适合希望在手机上查看车辆基础行驶信息的用户使用。

无需登录账号、无需云端授权、无需额外硬件设备，用户可通过手机与支持蓝牙能力的车辆建立本地连接，并查看车速等基础信息。

核心功能

- 无需账号登录
无需输入车辆平台账号密码，也无需远程授权。

- 蓝牙本地连接
通过车辆支持的蓝牙能力进行本地通信，在手机上查看车速等基础信息及部分车辆状态。

- 专注数字仪表体验
以简洁直观的方式展示驾驶中常用的信息，帮助用户更快速地获取重点数据。

- 多种界面风格
提供不同的背景与主题样式，用户可根据个人偏好选择不同显示风格。

- 本地优先
主要依赖本地蓝牙通信，不依赖云端服务，在弱网或无网环境下仍可使用相关本地功能。

隐私与安全

- 无需注册账号。
- 不长期在自建服务器存储车辆数据。
- 蓝牙、定位等权限仅用于设备连接、通信及相关显示功能。

适用场景

- 希望在手机上获得简洁的数字仪表盘体验。
- 不希望提供账号密码或依赖云端远程能力。
- 不希望安装额外硬件设备。

重要说明

Dash for Tesla 为第三方独立开发应用，与 Tesla, Inc. 及其附属公司无官方合作关系，也不存在隶属关系。

本应用基于车辆支持的蓝牙能力提供基础信息展示功能，不提供任何车辆改装、破解或刷写相关能力。

订阅说明

Dash for Tesla 高级会员提供自动续订订阅服务。

可选订阅方案：
- 月度订阅
- 年度订阅

付款将在您确认购买后从 Apple ID 账户扣除。
除非您在当前订阅周期结束前至少 24 小时取消续订，否则订阅将自动续费。
系统将在当前订阅周期结束前 24 小时内收取下一周期费用。
您可以随时在 App Store 账户设置中管理或取消订阅。

使用条款：https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

tw.description:
自2006年首次亮相以來，《泰坦之旅》吸引了眾多玩家。在《泰坦之旅》世界中，你將在無拘無束的英雄之旅中獲得全方位的體驗！

你的光榮任務是拯救世界！

單靠諸神無法打敗泰坦，所以需要真正的英雄 - 那就是你！你的成功或失敗將決定人類和奧林匹斯山諸神的命運！與你的定制英雄一起，探索希臘、埃及、巴比倫和中國的神秘、遠古世界。征服成群的傳奇生物，掌握各種武器和武術：射箭、劍術或使用強大的魔法！

遊歷古代和北歐神話世界！

當你旅行前往派特農神廟、大金字塔、巴比倫空中花園、長城、塔耳塔洛斯競技場和其他著名景點時，與神話中的野獸戰鬥。遭遇希臘神話中的最大惡棍，探索北歐未知的土地，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國，然後踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程。

在你的光榮道路上，要麼全部得到，要麼一無所有！

每一個挑戰等待著你，你必須擊敗更大更強的敵人，直到達到目標並迫使泰坦屈服！與勇敢的寵物同伴一起投入戰鬥！尋找具有特殊力量的非凡物品，這些物品將增強你的能力，幫助你前進。傳奇之劍、強大的閃電咒語、魔法、弓箭以及力量超乎想像的無數其他寶藏等待著你 - 它們全都可以在你的戰鬥中使用，在可怕的生物中散佈驚駭和恐懼！

你在等什麼？

不同於其他動作角色扮演遊戲，《泰坦之旅：傳奇版》將迷人的神話世界與無盡而刺激的動作融合在一起，正如你對如此引人入勝的遊戲所期待的！

主要特點：

- 在不朽王座下載包的世界中，你將遇到希臘神話中的最大惡棍，勇敢面對地獄犬的攻擊，危害冥河的河岸。你需要解釋盲人提爾西亞斯的預言，與阿伽門農和阿喀琉斯並肩作戰，用奧德修斯的計策征服這個黑暗的新冒險。

- 在諸神黃昏下載包的北歐未知土地上，你將勇敢面對凱爾特人、諾斯曼人和阿斯加迪神靈的領地！

- 在亞特蘭蒂斯下載包，與探險家會面，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國。據說有一把鑰匙藏在伊拉克利翁的日記中，該日記據傳位於腓尼基城市加迪爾。踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程，包括塔耳塔洛斯競技場，進行史詩般的戰鬥！

+ 經過全面技術修改的《泰坦之旅》實施了所有的重要更新，以賦予這部經典之作最佳的遊戲體驗！

在永恆餘燼DLC可在應用內購買的 中殺死巨巫泰肯之後，英雄受到傳說中的堯帝召喚，回到東方著手對付一直肆虐 這片大陸的邪魔威脅。 在追查過程中，英雄和他的同伴們發現，遠古兇獸窮奇的現身並非只是巧合，必定有兇險萬分的陰謀正在醞釀…

tw.description:
Lysoniq is a premium music player/streamer with cross-device remote control. Install it on your Apple devices to seamlessly play music through any one of them and control the app with the others.

Unlike AirPlay, the playing device streams directly from Apple Music at full resolution — enabling Hi-Res Lossless with zero compression or downsampling on compatible devices. Using an iPhone, iPad, Mac or Apple TV in your hifi system just became easier. No more extension cables or compromises.

Built to handle huge libraries — load thousands of songs into the player without slowdown. Full queue management with swipe to delete, drag to rearrange, tap to skip ahead, and insert into the queue. True Shuffle that actually randomizes your music. 

Browse the full Apple Music catalog with top songs, albums, and playlists across 30+ cities and countries, 17 genres, and dedicated Hi-Res Lossless and Dolby Atmos sections. Access Made For You, Recently Played, New Releases, live radio stations, and all of Apple Music's personalized recommendations. Your full synced library with sorting and filtering included.

Connect and control devices across your home Wi-Fi network with LYNQ. Extend connectivity across cellular data and different Wi-Fi networks with the LYNQ+ subscription.

Built-in Last.fm scrobbling with full history and stats. Four themes including Light, Dark, True Light, and True Dark.

Built from the ground up with audiophiles in mind. Reviewing audio gear? Use a subloop to focus in on a particular section of a track, with the option to add a timer between loops to switch equipment. Automatic sample rate switching on macOS — the system output adjusts to match each track's native resolution, so nothing gets resampled (up to 24-bit/96kHz). Output up to 24-bit/192kHz on iOS, 24-bit/96kHz on macOS, and 24-bit/48kHz on Apple TV.

Now available in 20 languages including Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified, and Traditional), Dutch, Finnish, French, German, Hebrew, Hindi, Italian, Japanese, Norwegian Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese (Portugal), Russian, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish, and Turkish.

Provide feedback to guide its development further and get the features you want. Enjoy all future updates with a one-time purchase.

Requires Apple Music installed on your devices and an active Apple Music subscription. See https://www.lysoniq.app/support for more details.

FULL MANUAL CONTROL

THOUGHTFUL FEATURES

• Double-tap to flip camera

PRIVACY FIRST

Capture what matters. It is what it is.

us.description:
Dash for Tesla is a Bluetooth-based digital dashboard app for users who want to view essential driving information on their phone.

No account login, no cloud authorization, and no additional hardware are required. With a supported Bluetooth connection, users can connect locally and view basic information such as vehicle speed and selected vehicle status.

Key Features

- No account login required
No vehicle platform account or password is required, and no remote API authorization is needed.

- Local Bluetooth connection
Connects through supported Bluetooth capabilities and displays essential information such as speed and selected vehicle status on your phone.

- Focused dashboard experience
Presents commonly used driving information in a clear and simple layout for quick viewing.

- Multiple visual styles
Offers different backgrounds and theme styles to match personal preferences.

- Local-first design
Primarily relies on local Bluetooth communication instead of cloud services, allowing relevant local features to remain available even in weak or offline network conditions.

Privacy and Security

- No account registration is required.
- Vehicle data is not stored long-term on self-hosted servers.
- Permissions such as Bluetooth and location are used only for local connection, communication, and related display features.

Use Cases

- Users who want a simple digital dashboard experience on their phone.
- Users who do not want to provide account credentials or rely on cloud-based remote access.
- Users who prefer not to install additional hardware devices.

Important Notice

Dash for Tesla is a third-party independently developed app and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially associated with Tesla, Inc. or its affiliates.

This app only provides basic information display based on supported Bluetooth capabilities and does not provide any vehicle modification, flashing, or hacking functionality.

Subscription Information

Dash for Tesla Premium offers auto-renewable subscriptions.

Available subscriptions:
- Monthly Plan
- Yearly Plan

Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase.
Subscription automatically renews unless it is canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period.
You can manage or cancel your subscription at any time in your App Store account settings.

Privacy Policy: https://tdash.cn/privacy.html
Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

us.description:
Lysoniq is a premium music player/streamer with cross-device remote control. Install it on your Apple devices to seamlessly play music through any one of them and control the app with the others.

Unlike AirPlay, the playing device streams directly from Apple Music at full resolution — enabling Hi-Res Lossless with zero compression or downsampling on compatible devices. Using an iPhone, iPad, Mac or Apple TV in your hifi system just became easier. No more extension cables or compromises.

Built to handle huge libraries — load thousands of songs into the player without slowdown. Full queue management with swipe to delete, drag to rearrange, tap to skip ahead, and insert into the queue. True Shuffle that actually randomizes your music. 

Browse the full Apple Music catalog with top songs, albums, and playlists across 30+ cities and countries, 17 genres, and dedicated Hi-Res Lossless and Dolby Atmos sections. Access Made For You, Recently Played, New Releases, live radio stations, and all of Apple Music's personalized recommendations. Your full synced library with sorting and filtering included.

Connect and control devices across your home Wi-Fi network with LYNQ. Extend connectivity across cellular data and different Wi-Fi networks with the LYNQ+ subscription.

Built-in Last.fm scrobbling with full history and stats. Four themes including Light, Dark, True Light, and True Dark.

Built from the ground up with audiophiles in mind. Reviewing audio gear? Use a subloop to focus in on a particular section of a track, with the option to add a timer between loops to switch equipment. Automatic sample rate switching on macOS — the system output adjusts to match each track's native resolution, so nothing gets resampled (up to 24-bit/96kHz). Output up to 24-bit/192kHz on iOS, 24-bit/96kHz on macOS, and 24-bit/48kHz on Apple TV.

Now available in 20 languages including Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified, and Traditional), Dutch, Finnish, French, German, Hebrew, Hindi, Italian, Japanese, Norwegian Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese (Portugal), Russian, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish, and Turkish.

Provide feedback to guide its development further and get the features you want. Enjoy all future updates with a one-time purchase.

Requires Apple Music installed on your devices and an active Apple Music subscription. See https://www.lysoniq.app/support for more details.

Digline is a relaxed and easy to learn drilling game where every descent is a gamble between progress and risk, and the real reward lies deeper underground.

Start each run in your workshop, pick your setup, and head down with limited fuel and a scrappy rig. Carve your path through shifting layers of earth, decide what to collect, and choose what to upgrade and what to trade before everything runs out.

Each dive reveals new materials, rarer finds, and unexpected patterns beneath the surface. What begins as simple digging gradually turns into a careful balance between exploration, efficiency, and timing.

Back at the surface, refine your strategy and improve your runs:

• Upgrade your drill, fuel capacity, and efficiency
• Unlock new materials with higher value and deeper placement
• Optimize routes to maximize each descent

Progress builds steadily, but every run carries tension. Go too safe and you leave value behind. Push too far and risk losing it all.

Shape your own rhythm underground: short and efficient runs, deep high-risk dives, or a steady climb toward mastering what lies below.

Top 10 casual game in the US and UK, Top 5 in Germany, Norway, and others. Come join the fun!

What starts as a simple search for resources gradually becomes something stranger. Your old tunnels remain, your map expands over time, and the underground begins to feel less random and more like a place with its own history.

Digline is designed to be easy to pick up, fun in short sessions, and rewarding over the long term. Quick digs, short descents, tons of relaxing fun.

Features:

• intuitive one-finger portrait controls
• short runs that fit easily into a minute or two
• persistent tunnels and a map that grows with each expedition
• multiple underground regions with different materials, hazards, and surprises
• resources to gather and use for crafting upgrades, and better preparation
• a workshop that turns each successful run into permanent progress
• a market system for trading what you bring back
• progression that builds across many sessions, not just a single run
• a calm, cozy atmosphere with a sense of discovery underneath it
• no ads, and no pay-to-win systems
• by popular request, you can now purchase fuel if you want to keep on digging, but the game can be completed without any purchase
• achievements and Daily Dig leaderboard competition

The deeper you go, the more the mine will reveal.

Capture what matters. It is what it is.

Road to Empress I has captivated audiences globally.
Now, Road to Empress II plunges you into a gripping battle of court politics. Watch a legendary empress rise to new glory!

● 4K Cinematic Quality, Eastern Palace Aesthetics Reimagined
Filmed on lavishly built sets with 4K cinematic lighting, the story brings Eastern palaces to life: silk brocade texture, glinting golden hairpins, and a stirring traditional score. Dash for Tesla is a Bluetooth-based digital dashboard app for users who want to view essential driving information on their phone.

No account login, no cloud authorization, and no additional hardware are required. With a supported Bluetooth connection, users can connect locally and view basic information such as vehicle speed and selected vehicle status.

Key Features

- No account login required
No vehicle platform account or password is required, and no remote API authorization is needed.

- Local Bluetooth connection
Connects through supported Bluetooth capabilities and displays essential information such as speed and selected vehicle status on your phone.

- Focused dashboard experience
Presents commonly used driving information in a clear and simple layout for quick viewing.

- Multiple visual styles
Offers different backgrounds and theme styles to match personal preferences.

- Local-first design
Primarily relies on local Bluetooth communication instead of cloud services, allowing relevant local features to remain available even in weak or offline network conditions.

Privacy and Security

- No account registration is required.
- Vehicle data is not stored long-term on self-hosted servers.
- Permissions such as Bluetooth and location are used only for local connection, communication, and related display features.

Use Cases

- Users who want a simple digital dashboard experience on their phone.
- Users who do not want to provide account credentials or rely on cloud-based remote access.
- Users who prefer not to install additional hardware devices.

Important Notice

Dash for Tesla is a third-party independently developed app and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially associated with Tesla, Inc. or its affiliates.

This app only provides basic information display based on supported Bluetooth capabilities and does not provide any vehicle modification, flashing, or hacking functionality.

Subscription Information

Dash for Tesla Premium offers auto-renewable subscriptions.

Available subscriptions:
- Monthly Plan
- Yearly Plan

Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase.
Subscription automatically renews unless it is canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period.
You can manage or cancel your subscription at any time in your App Store account settings.

Privacy Policy: https://tdash.cn/privacy.html
Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

tr.description:
Titan Quest has captivated legions of players since its 2006 debut. You get the all-encompassing experience of an unbridled, truly heroic journey through the worlds of Titan Quest!

Your honorable quest is to save the world!

The gods alone cannot defeat the Titans, so real heroes are needed - and that can only be you! Your success or failure will decide the fate of the people and the Olympians! With your custom-created hero, scour the mystical and ancient worlds of Greece, Egypt, Babylon, and China. Conquer the hordes of legendary creatures and master various weapons and martial arts: Archery, sword fighting, or the use of powerful magic!

Travel a world of antiquity and Nordic mythology!

Battle the beasts of mythology as you travel to the Parthenon, the Great Pyramids, the Hanging Gardens of Babylon, the Great Wall, the Tartarus Arena, and other famous places. Encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, discover the uncharted lands of northern Europe, search for the mythical kingdom of Atlantis, and set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean.

It’s all or nothing on your glorious path!

With each challenge that awaits you, you'll have to defeat bigger and stronger enemies until you reach your goal and force the Titans to their knees! Rush into battle alongside brave pet companions! Find extraordinary items with special powers that will enhance your abilities and help you on your path. Legendary swords, powerful lightning spells, magical, bows and numerous other treasures with unimaginable powers await you - all of them are at your disposal in your battles and spread fear and terror among the hideous creatures!

What are you waiting for?

Like no other game in the Action RPG genre, Titan Quest: Legendary Edition combines the fascinating world of mythology with endless and exciting action that you would expect from such a compelling game!

Features:
+ Within the world of the Immortal Throne DLC, you’ll encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, brave the attacks of Cerberus, and hazard the banks of the River Styx. You have to interpret the prophecies of the blind seer Tiresias, fight alongside Agamemnon and Achilles, and use the wiles of Odysseus to conquer this dark new adventure.

+ In the uncharted lands of northern Europe in the Ragnarök DLC, you’ll brave the realms of the Celts, the Northmen, and the Asgardian gods!

+ Meet an explorer in the Atlantis DLC, in search of the mythical kingdom of Atlantis. A key is supposedly hidden in the diary of Herakles, which is rumored to be located in the Phoenician City of Gadir. Set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean, including the Tartarus Arena for epic battles!

+ All important updates have been implemented to the technically overhauled Titan Quest to grant the best gaming experience of this classic ever!

+ ETERNAL EMBERS DLCs available as in-app purchase - Summoned by the legendary Emperor Yao, the Hero is called back into the East to deal with a demonic threat that has been ravaging the land after the Telkine was slain.

! A note for all players who own the base version of Titan Quest: The DLCs mentioned here are also available for purchase as additional content so that all fans can upgrade their game to fully enjoy all expansions!

tr.description:
Lysoniq is a premium music player/streamer with cross-device remote control. Install it on your Apple devices to seamlessly play music through any one of them and control the app with the others.

Unlike AirPlay, the playing device streams directly from Apple Music at full resolution — enabling Hi-Res Lossless with zero compression or downsampling on compatible devices. Using an iPhone, iPad, Mac or Apple TV in your hifi system just became easier. No more extension cables or compromises.

Built to handle huge libraries — load thousands of songs into the player without slowdown. Full queue management with swipe to delete, drag to rearrange, tap to skip ahead, and insert into the queue. True Shuffle that actually randomizes your music. 

Browse the full Apple Music catalog with top songs, albums, and playlists across 30+ cities and countries, 17 genres, and dedicated Hi-Res Lossless and Dolby Atmos sections. Access Made For You, Recently Played, New Releases, live radio stations, and all of Apple Music's personalized recommendations. Your full synced library with sorting and filtering included.

Connect and control devices across your home Wi-Fi network with LYNQ. Extend connectivity across cellular data and different Wi-Fi networks with the LYNQ+ subscription.

Built-in Last.fm scrobbling with full history and stats. Four themes including Light, Dark, True Light, and True Dark.

Built from the ground up with audiophiles in mind. Reviewing audio gear? Use a subloop to focus in on a particular section of a track, with the option to add a timer between loops to switch equipment. Automatic sample rate switching on macOS — the system output adjusts to match each track's native resolution, so nothing gets resampled (up to 24-bit/96kHz). Output up to 24-bit/192kHz on iOS, 24-bit/96kHz on macOS, and 24-bit/48kHz on Apple TV.

Now available in 20 languages including Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified, and Traditional), Dutch, Finnish, French, German, Hebrew, Hindi, Italian, Japanese, Norwegian Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese (Portugal), Russian, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish, and Turkish.

Provide feedback to guide its development further and get the features you want. Enjoy all future updates with a one-time purchase.

Requires Apple Music installed on your devices and an active Apple Music subscription. See https://www.lysoniq.app/support for more details.

tr.description:
戏曲锣鼓是一款专为戏曲爱好者打造的虚拟打击乐器应用，让你在手机或平板上，随时随地体验传统戏曲锣鼓演奏的魅力。应用内收录多种经典戏曲打击乐器，并支持高度自定义配置，满足不同戏曲流派、演奏风格与个人创作需求。本应用主要有以下特点：

- 简单易用，初学者友好：界面简洁直观，无论是戏曲初学者还是专业爱好者，都能快速上手。通过触屏即可轻松演奏，随时体验传统锣鼓节奏。

- 丰富的戏曲锣鼓乐器：内置多种经典戏曲打击乐器，如大鼓、大堂鼓、小堂鼓、大锣、小锣、风锣、铙钹、小钹、广钹、板鼓、板、梆子、碰铃、木鱼、引磬、铛子、大磬、钟、手鼓，并提供不同力度音色，还原真实演奏体验。

- 高性能无延迟演奏：敲击即响，声音响应迅速；支持快速连续击打、多点触控与多音同时打击，演奏流畅不卡顿、不串音。

- 强大的键盘自定义系统：支持自由调整键盘布局、行列数量、按键大小与间距，支持拖拽交换按键位置，支持背景外观配置，打造更符合个人习惯的戏曲锣鼓演奏界面。

- 灵活的按钮配置：支持按钮颜色自定义、按键图片显示、按键名称修改等功能，每个按键最多可绑定 3 个乐器音色，实现个性化锣鼓经与专属打击垫配置。

- 录音与回放功能：支持实时录制戏曲锣鼓演奏过程，一键保存精彩演奏内容，并可随时回放练习成果，方便记录灵感、复盘节奏与分享作品。

立即下载，开启属于你的戏曲锣鼓演奏之旅！如遇到错误或提供意见与建议，请联系邮箱：yuliuapp@icloud.com

tr.description:
Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly.

Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap.

The Filtr add-on extends Wipr’s blocking to all apps on your device. It acts at the network level, but unlike a VPN, it can access none of your data, and can be used in conjunction with VPNs, iCloud Private Relay, and custom DNS.

Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese.

Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported.

Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”.

This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it.

– Kaylee

EULA: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

pt.description:
Digline é um jogo de perfuração relaxante e fácil de aprender, onde cada descida é uma pequena aposta entre progresso e risco, e a verdadeira recompensa está mais fundo no subsolo.

Comece cada partida na sua oficina, escolha sua configuração e desça com combustível limitado e um equipamento improvisado. Abra caminho através de camadas de terra em constante mudança, decida o que coletar e escolha o momento certo para voltar antes que tudo se esgote.

Cada descida revela novos materiais, descobertas mais raras e padrões inesperados sob a superfície. O que começa como uma simples escavação gradualmente se transforma em um equilíbrio cuidadoso entre exploração, eficiência e tempo.

De volta à superfície, refine sua estratégia e melhore suas partidas:

• Melhore sua perfuradora, capacidade de combustível e eficiência
• Desbloqueie novos materiais de maior valor e localizados mais profundamente
• Otimize rotas para maximizar cada descida

O progresso se acumula de forma constante, mas cada partida carrega tensão. Se jogar com muita cautela, você deixa valor para trás. Se avançar demais, corre o risco de perder tudo.

Defina seu próprio ritmo no subsolo: partidas curtas e eficientes, descidas profundas de alto risco ou uma progressão constante rumo ao domínio do que está abaixo.

Top 10 jogos casuais nos Estados Unidos e no Reino Unido, Top 5 na Alemanha, Noruega e outros. Venha se juntar à diversão!

O que começa como uma simples busca por recursos gradualmente se torna algo mais estranho. Seus antigos túneis permanecem, seu mapa se expande com o tempo, e o subsolo passa a parecer menos aleatório e mais como um lugar com sua própria história.

Digline foi projetado para ser fácil de começar, divertido em sessões curtas e recompensador no longo prazo. Escavações rápidas, descidas curtas, muita diversão relaxante.

Recursos:

• controles intuitivos com um dedo em modo retrato
• partidas curtas que cabem facilmente em um ou dois minutos
• túneis persistentes e um mapa que cresce a cada expedição
• múltiplas regiões subterrâneas com diferentes materiais, perigos e surpresas
• recursos para coletar e usar na criação de melhorias e melhor preparação
• uma oficina que transforma cada partida bem-sucedida em progresso permanente
• um sistema de mercado para negociar o que você traz de volta
• progressão que se constrói ao longo de muitas sessões, não apenas uma única partida
• uma atmosfera calma e aconchegante com um senso de descoberta por baixo
• sem anúncios, sem compras dentro do aplicativo e sem sistemas pay-to-win
• conquistas e competição no placar do Daily Dig

Quanto mais fundo você vai, mais a mina revela.

pt.description:
IIWII is a minimalist camera app that brings the beauty of analog film photography to your iPhone.

IT IS WHAT IT IS — No complicated settings, no endless menus. Just point, shoot, and capture authentic moments with stunning film-inspired looks applied in real-time.

TIMELESS FILM LOOKS
• Carefully crafted presets inspired by classic film stocks
• Real-time preview — what you see is what you get
• Adjustable intensity for your perfect look
• Import your own .cube LUT files as custom looks
• Look Manager — create and fine-tune your looks with tone curves, color mixing, white balance and more
• Natural Processing — less computational overprocessing, more authentic camera feel

FULL MANUAL CONTROL
• White Balance, Shutter Speed, ISO and Focus
• Each parameter toggleable between Auto and Manual
• Swipe down to reveal, swipe up to hide

THOUGHTFUL FEATURES
• RAW+ Capture on all iPhones — save DNG files alongside your photo
• Portrait mode with natural depth-of-field blur
• Double Exposure — blend two shots into one, just like real film
• Self-Timer with 2, 5 or 10 second countdown
• Record video with real-time film looks applied
• Grid overlays and horizon level for composition
• Built-in gallery with sharing and favorites
• QR Code detection

DESIGNED FOR SIMPLICITY
• Clean, distraction-free interface
• Ambient light effect reacts to your camera feed (iOS 26)
• Quick preset switching with swipe gestures
• Double-tap to flip camera
• Edge exposure slider for precise control
• Customizable top bar — choose your controls
• Lock Screen camera with shared settings and looks

PRIVACY FIRST
• GPS tagging is optional and controllable
• Location data automatically removed when sharing (configurable)
• No analytics, no tracking, no ads — ever

IIWII respects your moments. No cloud uploads, no accounts, no subscriptions. Your photos stay on your device.

Capture what matters. It is what it is.

pt.description:
CORRIDAS DE RALLY REALISTAS NA PERSPETIVA VERTICAL!
Rush Rally Origins combina as corridas clássicas na perspetiva vertical do original Rush Rally com os gráficos e a física fortemente elogiados de Rush Rally 3. Corre em 36 etapas novas e únicas em todo o mundo, onde a hora do dia e as condições meteorológicas são variantes importantes. Mostra os teus dotes ao volante em diferentes tipos de piso, incluindo neve, gravilha, terra, lama e asfalto!

SENTE A ADRENALINA
Corre a 60 fps (120 fps nos dispositivos compatíveis) com um dos melhores modelos de dinâmica de carros até à data, especialmente afinado para o Rush Rally Origins para proporcionar uma experiência de corrida mais divertida na perspetiva vertical. Sente a aderência à estrada a mudar consoante o piso e as condições atmosféricas.

CAMPEONATOS DE RALLY
Compete numa série de campeonatos de rally, corre contra outros no original modo A-B Race ou mantém o sangue frio e a concentração para melhorares os teus tempos no modo de jogo de contrarrelógio.

CHEGA AO TOPO
Bate os recordes das etapas para subires ao topo das tabelas classificativas online do mundo inteiro. Transfere fantasmas em 4 diferentes classes de carros para comparares as tuas trajetórias de corrida com as dos melhores do mundo.

APERFEIÇOA OS TEUS CARROS

Dash for Tesla 是一款基于蓝牙连接的数字仪表盘应用，适合希望在手机上查看车辆基础行驶信息的用户使用。

无需登录账号、无需云端授权、无需额外硬件设备，用户可通过手机与支持蓝牙能力的车辆建立本地连接，并查看车速等基础信息。

核心功能

- 无需账号登录
无需输入车辆平台账号密码，也无需远程授权。

- 蓝牙本地连接
通过车辆支持的蓝牙能力进行本地通信，在手机上查看车速等基础信息及部分车辆状态。

- 专注数字仪表体验
以简洁直观的方式展示驾驶中常用的信息，帮助用户更快速地获取重点数据。

- 多种界面风格
提供不同的背景与主题样式，用户可根据个人偏好选择不同显示风格。

- 本地优先
主要依赖本地蓝牙通信，不依赖云端服务，在弱网或无网环境下仍可使用相关本地功能。

隐私与安全

- 无需注册账号。
- 不长期在自建服务器存储车辆数据。
- 蓝牙、定位等权限仅用于设备连接、通信及相关显示功能。

适用场景

- 希望在手机上获得简洁的数字仪表盘体验。
- 不希望提供账号密码或依赖云端远程能力。
- 不希望安装额外硬件设备。

重要说明

Dash for Tesla 为第三方独立开发应用，与 Tesla, Inc. 及其附属公司无官方合作关系，也不存在隶属关系。

本应用基于车辆支持的蓝牙能力提供基础信息展示功能，不提供任何车辆改装、破解或刷写相关能力。

订阅说明

Dash for Tesla 高级会员提供自动续订订阅服务。

可选订阅方案：
- 月度订阅
- 年度订阅

付款将在您确认购买后从 Apple ID 账户扣除。
除非您在当前订阅周期结束前至少 24 小时取消续订，否则订阅将自动续费。
系统将在当前订阅周期结束前 24 小时内收取下一周期费用。
您可以随时在 App Store 账户设置中管理或取消订阅。

pt.description:
Earthquake Network is the most comprehensive app on earthquakes and for most world countries it is the only earthquake early warning system for receiving real time alerts.

Earthquake Network gives you:

- Real time alerts if you live close to the epicentre
- Alerts seconds in advances if you live far from the epicentre
- Real time user reports on felt earthquakes
- Free earthquake data from 21 seismic networks including U.S., Puerto Rico, India, Indonesia, Turkey, Mexico, Chile, Peru, Ecuador, Argentina, Venezuela, Dominican Republic, Colombia, Costa Rica, Nicaragua, China, New Zeland, Japan, Italy, Croatia, Spain and Greece

The Earthquake Network research project (https://www.sismo.app) aims at developing a smartphone-based earthquake early warning system able to detect earthquakes in real time and to alert the population in advance. Smartphones are able to detect earthquakes thanks to the accelerometer on-board each device. When an earthquake is detected, users with the application installed are immediatly alerted. Since earthquake waves travel at around 5 km/s it is possible to alert the population not yet reached by the damaging waves of the earthquake. For the scientific details about the project please refer to the scientific paper on Frontiers at https://bit.ly/2C8B5HI

Subscriptions:

When an earthquake is detected in real time by smartphones near the epicenter, the server sends an alert to all users with the app. Alerting all users can take up to 10 seconds since it is not technically feasible to do so instantly. Now you can join the priority lists of the first 10,000 or 100,000 people alerted in real time. The following subscriptions are available:

- Subscription 10k for 1 year
- Subscription 10k for 1 month 

- Subscription 100k for 1 year
- Subscription 100k for 1 month

• Subscriptions may be managed by the user and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to the user's Account Settings after purchase
• Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when the user purchases a subscription to that publication, where applicable

Abra caminho no soco pelas ruas de Streets of Rage mais uma vez!

Streets of Rage 4 traz o legado do jogo neste beat'em rretrô, com gráficos inspirados em quadrinhos desenhados à mão e mecânica atualizada.

Streets of Rage volta para uma sequência 25 anos após o último episódio: um novo sindicato do crime parece ter assumido o controle das ruas e corrompido a polícia. Tudo que você tem disponível para lutar contra eles são seus amigos... e seus punhos! Streets of Rage 4 foi aclamado pela crítica e ganhou vários prêmios inclusive foi indicado como Melhor Jogo de Ação no Game Awards 2020.

- Redescubra a franquia do clássico Beat em up - Streets of Rage - com mecânicas de luta atualizadas
- Emocione-se com uma direção artística inspirada em quadrinhos retrô desenhada à mão pelo estúdio por trás de Wonder Boy: The Dragon's Trap, trazendo animações prazerosas e efeitos vívidos

- Nova cooperativa move-se

- Novos destroíveis para ajudar a manter o contador combinado

A luta continua em Wood Oak City.
Após os eventos de Streets of Rage 4, nossos heróis foram se preparar para futuras ameaças. pt.description:
O Titan Quest cativou legiões de jogadores desde a sua estreia em 2006. Tu recebes a experiência abrangente de uma jornada desenfreada e verdadeiramente heróica pelos mundos de Titan Quest!

A tua honrosa missão é salvar o mundo!

Sozinhos, os deuses sozinhos não conseguem derrotar os Titãs. Por isso, são necessários heróis reais - e só podes ser tu! O teu sucesso ou fracasso decidirá o destino do povo e dos Olympians! Percorre os mundos místicos e antigos da Grécia, Egito, Babilónia e China com o teu herói personalizado. Conquista as hordas de criaturas lendárias e domina várias armas e artes marciais: tiro com arco, luta de espadas ou o uso de magia poderosa!

Viaja por um mundo de antiguidade e mitologia nórdica!

Luta contra as feras da mitologia enquanto viajas para o Partenon, as Grandes Pirâmides, os Jardins Suspensos da Babilónia, a Grande Muralha, a Arena do Tártaro e outros lugares famosos. Encontra os maiores vilões da mitologia grega, descobre as terras desconhecidas do norte da Europa, procura o reino mítico da Atlântida e faz uma jornada pelo Mediterrâneo Ocidental.

É tudo ou nada no teu caminho glorioso!

A cada desafio que te espera, terás que derrotar inimigos maiores e mais fortes até atingires o teu objetivo e forçar os Titãs a ajoelharem! Corre para a batalha ao lado de bravos companheiros de estimação! Encontra itens extraordinários com poderes especiais que irão melhorar as tuas capacidades e ajudar-te no teu caminho. Espadas lendárias, feitiços de relâmpagos poderosos, magia, arcos e vários outros tesouros com poderes inimagináveis esperam por ti - todos eles estão à tua disposição nas tuas batalhas e espalham medo e terror entre as criaturas horríveis!

De que estás à espera?

Como nenhum outro jogo no género RPG de ação, o Titan Quest: Edição Lendária combina o fascinante mundo da mitologia com a ação interminável e emocionante que esperas de um jogo tão atraente!

Características principais:

- No DLC do Trono Imortal, encontrarás os maiores vilões da mitologia grega, enfrentarás os ataques de Cerberus e arriscarás as margens do Rio Styx. Deves interpretar as profecias do vidente cego Tirésias, lutar ao lado de Agamenon e Aquiles e usar os ardis de Odisseu para conquistar esta nova aventura sombria.

- Nas terras desconhecidas do norte da Europa no Ragnarök DLC, enfrentarás os reinos dos celtas, dos homens do norte e dos deuses Asgardianos!

- Conhece um explorador no DLC Atlantis, em busca do reino mítico da Atlântida. Uma chave está supostamente escondida no diário de Hércules, que dizem estar localizado na cidade fenícia de Gadir. Começa uma jornada pelo Mediterrâneo Ocidental, incluindo a Arena do Tártaro para batalhas épicas!

+ Todas as atualizações importantes foram implementadas no Titan Quest revisto tecnicamente para garantir a melhor experiência de jogo deste clássico de todos os tempos!

+ ETERNAL EMBERS DLCs disponíveis como compra in-app - Invocado pelo lendário Imperador Yao, o Herói é chamado de volta ao Leste para lidar com uma ameaça demoníaca que está devastando a terra depois que o Telkine foi morto.

+ Uma nota para todos os jogadores que possuem a versão básica do Titan Quest: Os DLCs mencionados aqui também serão lançados para compra como conteúdo adicional para que todos os fãs possam atualizar os seus jogos para desfrutarem todas as expansões!

pt.description:
Lysoniq is a premium music player/streamer with cross-device remote control. Install it on your Apple devices to seamlessly play music through any one of them and control the app with the others.

Unlike AirPlay, the playing device streams directly from Apple Music at full resolution — enabling Hi-Res Lossless with zero compression or downsampling on compatible devices. Using an iPhone, iPad, Mac or Apple TV in your hifi system just became easier. No more extension cables or compromises.

Built to handle huge libraries — load thousands of songs into the player without slowdown. Full queue management with swipe to delete, drag to rearrange, tap to skip ahead, and insert into the queue. True Shuffle that actually randomizes your music. 

Browse the full Apple Music catalog with top songs, albums, and playlists across 30+ cities and countries, 17 genres, and dedicated Hi-Res Lossless and Dolby Atmos sections. Access Made For You, Recently Played, New Releases, live radio stations, and all of Apple Music's personalized recommendations. Your full synced library with sorting and filtering included.

Connect and control devices across your home Wi-Fi network with LYNQ. Extend connectivity across cellular data and different Wi-Fi networks with the LYNQ+ subscription.

Built-in Last.fm scrobbling with full history and stats. Four themes including Light, Dark, True Light, and True Dark.

Built from the ground up with audiophiles in mind. Reviewing audio gear? Use a subloop to focus in on a particular section of a track, with the option to add a timer between loops to switch equipment. Automatic sample rate switching on macOS — the system output adjusts to match each track's native resolution, so nothing gets resampled (up to 24-bit/96kHz). Output up to 24-bit/192kHz on iOS, 24-bit/96kHz on macOS, and 24-bit/48kHz on Apple TV.

Now available in 20 languages including Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified, and Traditional), Dutch, Finnish, French, German, Hebrew, Hindi, Italian, Japanese, Norwegian Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese (Portugal), Russian, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish, and Turkish.

Provide feedback to guide its development further and get the features you want. Enjoy all future updates with a one-time purchase.

Requires Apple Music installed on your devices and an active Apple Music subscription. See https://www.lysoniq.app/support for more details.

- 简单易用，初学者友好：界面简洁直观，无论是戏曲初学者还是专业爱好者，都能快速上手。通过触屏即可轻松演奏，随时体验传统锣鼓节奏。

- 丰富的戏曲锣鼓乐器：内置多种经典戏曲打击乐器，如大鼓、大堂鼓、小堂鼓、大锣、小锣、风锣、铙钹、小钹、广钹、板鼓、板、梆子、碰铃、木鱼、引磬、铛子、大磬、钟、手鼓，并提供不同力度音色，还原真实演奏体验。

- 高性能无延迟演奏：敲击即响，声音响应迅速；支持快速连续击打、多点触控与多音同时打击，演奏流畅不卡顿、不串音。

- 强大的键盘自定义系统：支持自由调整键盘布局、行列数量、按键大小与间距，支持拖拽交换按键位置，支持背景外观配置，打造更符合个人习惯的戏曲锣鼓演奏界面。

- 灵活的按钮配置：支持按钮颜色自定义、按键图片显示、按键名称修改等功能，每个按键最多可绑定 3 个乐器音色，实现个性化锣鼓经与专属打击垫配置。

- 录音与回放功能：支持实时录制戏曲锣鼓演奏过程，一键保存精彩演奏内容，并可随时回放练习成果，方便记录灵感、复盘节奏与分享作品。

立即下载，开启属于你的戏曲锣鼓演奏之旅！如遇到错误或提供意见与建议，请联系邮箱：yuliuapp@icloud.com
